Container.Name: Floe-Client
Container.Overview: Web client for Floe encrypted peer-to-peer file transfer. Install Floe-Server first, then set that server template's Client URL to this app's exact browser origin.[br][br]For direct LAN access, Signaling Server Port must match the host port assigned to Floe-Server. For HTTPS or a different server hostname, set Signaling Server URL instead.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port used to open the Floe web client.

Config.Name: Signaling Server Port
Config.Description: Host port assigned to Floe-Server. Used with the browser hostname when Signaling Server URL is empty.

Config.Name: Signaling Server URL
Config.Description: Optional complete public signaling URL, for example https://api.example.com. Required when using HTTPS or a different hostname. Takes precedence over Signaling Server Port.
